title: Roasted Smoky Ethiopian Cheese Dulet
description: A comforting, smoky, and cheesy Ethiopian dish featuring a green salsa and yuzu-cure, perfect for ovo-vegetarians. Serve in a wok for an authentic experience.
instructions: Mix together the smoked gouda cheese, green curry paste, cilantro, yuzu juice, ginger, garlic, green chile peppers, paprika, salt, and black pepper in a bowl until well combined.
Gradually add the flour to the cheese mixture and mix until a crumbly dough forms.
Shape the dough into a ball and flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Heat the olive oil in a wok over medium heat.
Add the cheese disk to the wok and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the wok to the preheated oven and roast for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the wok from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with additional cilantro and serve with a side of green salsa.
